video.title: Synthetic Local Policy Panel: Orchard Tech Adoption

segments.text: The local plan gives policy incentives for sensor adoption, but it does not guarantee water savings.
segments.speaker: policy_professor

segments.text: Several growers say maintenance and calibration are the hidden cost, not the hardware price.
segments.speaker: grower_rep

segments.text: The useful part is monitoring, not proving that the software caused the yield bump.
segments.speaker: policy_professor

segments.text: The subsidy deadline is pushing sensor adoption faster than farmer demand.
segments.speaker: policy_professor
